不得不品的一环🤤"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772035050,"group_id":"7601492908025318425","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"子弹要吃最小号@#@","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0zhV79mGfsTAvFd/Rt6lHlYGhF4D+apReTU060U2PNs","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b541ffc8475b4f4a97774cd75b7fb391~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531948&x-signature=t8%2FL6gWhsE7kHZ0%2B99%2BtkbFyOs0%3D","user_id":"3740957737760061","user_name":"爱吃杂鱼的最小号子弹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3740957737760061","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":9,"fan_ranklist_title":"炼铜仔","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601492908025318425","book_info":{"abstract":"胡汉川，男，二十四岁，是学...是社畜。
在这个穿越者多如狗的世界，身为穿越者大军的一员自己老老实实赚钱生活。
一次意识潜入拟真游戏的any%速通直播中，胡汉川打破记录在半小时内完成通关，正准备美美下播的时候发现自己的退出键被抠了！
成百上千万的游戏玩家知道这件事后涌入直播间，更让人离奇诡异的事情是...
你告诉我我玩的不是游戏？而是真的在异世界展开了一场惊心动魄的大冒险？
歪特？
玩个游戏还能二次穿越的？
还有你告诉我游戏里的妹子也是真的？
那自己曾经玩过那么多游戏，那些妹子不会全找过来吧？
什么叫修萝场？？？？？？？
你说她们打起来了是什么意思？？？？？？
等等，你这头肥鸡！还有你这头傲娇蠢龙！不要在把自己下的蛋拿来西红柿炒蛋了！我已经吃撑了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2od2b79a4a05c3118584479de62dccedd6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"细枝硕果萝莉猫娘","author_id":"","book_id":"7601492908025318425","book_name":"羞萝场玩家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601523772897624600","read_count":"12208","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"304880"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"125","tags":"游戏体育,异世大陆,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c57c1604fb1ed8f66fc06af16581d2a3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183290&x-signature=b7A5IItZFT8Q8Uf5t7R8JfDKA9Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1183528857642944","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201734508D9EA2B42EED72CF17C5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7266,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3426},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7611443259317158680","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"蛮好看的，刚开始看是
